allow: Bash(node -e "const core = require\('@dicebear/core'\); const pixelArt = require\('@dicebear/pixel-art'\); console.log\('Modules imported successfully'\); console.log\('Core:', typeof core\); console.log\('PixelArt:', typeof pixelArt\);")

Bash(node --input-type=module -e "import {createAvatar} from '@dicebear/core'; import * as pixelArt from '@dicebear/pixel-art'; const a = createAvatar\(pixelArt, {}\); console.log\(a.toString\(\).slice\(0,30\)\)")
Bash(node -e "const {create} = require\('@dicebear/pixel-art'\); const style = create\({}\); console.log\(typeof style\);")
Bash(node -e "const {createAvatar} = require\('@dicebear/core'\); const {create} = require\('@dicebear/pixel-art'\); console.log\(createAvatar.length\); console.log\(typeof createAvatar\);")
